title: ilex johnstonii
intro: Ilex johnstonii, also known as the Johnston's Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex johnstonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ilex johnstonii can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of ailments, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
